mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% increase in housing starts over the past 2 months signals a strengthening demand for residential real estate, which is positively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with > 10% HOUST growth are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 5% decline in industrial production over the past 3 months signals a weakening supply chain, which is negatively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with > 5% INDPRO decline are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% increase in the unemployment rate over the past 2 months signals a weakening labor market, which is negatively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with > 0.5% UNRATE growth are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% increase in real GDP over the past 6 months signals a strengthening demand for goods and services, which is positively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with > 10% GDPC1 growth are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% increase in the federal funds rate over the past 3 months signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with > 0.5% FEDFUNDS growth are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% increase in real GDP over the past 6 months and a 5% increase in housing starts over the past 2 months signal a strengthening demand for goods and services and residential real estate, which is positively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with > 10% GDPC1 growth and > 5% HOUST growth are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 5% decline in industrial production over the past 3 months and a 10% decline in real GDP over the past 6 months signal a weakening supply chain and demand for goods and services, which is negatively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with > 5% INDPRO decline and > 10% GDPC1 decline are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
